data_sources.name: NW Natural Equipment Data
data_sources.description: Equipment inventory by premise (type, efficiency, vintage)

data_gaps.name: Equipment Efficiency Ratings
data_gaps.description: Not all equipment has explicit efficiency ratings in NW Natural data
data_gaps.impact: Used RBSA-derived efficiency distributions and defaults

data_gaps.name: Building Envelope Characteristics
data_gaps.description: NW Natural data lacks detailed envelope properties (insulation, window type)
data_gaps.impact: Used RBSA 2022 building shell data as proxy

data_gaps.name: Occupancy and Usage Patterns
data_gaps.description: No detailed occupancy or usage pattern data available
data_gaps.impact: Used RECS national averages and RBSA metering data

assumptions.name: Heating Degree Days (HDD) Model
assumptions.description: Space heating consumption modeled as linear function of HDD (base 65°F)
assumptions.justification: Standard industry practice; validated against RBSA metering data

assumptions.name: Equipment Replacement via Weibull Survival
assumptions.description: Equipment replacement timing follows Weibull survival distribution
assumptions.justification: Empirically grounded in ASHRAE service life data

assumptions.name: Baseload Consumption Factors
assumptions.description: Non-weather-sensitive end uses (cooking, drying) modeled as constant annual consumption
assumptions.justification: Derived from RECS 2020 and RBSA metering data

assumptions.name: Weather Station Assignment
assumptions.description: Premises assigned to nearest weather station by district
assumptions.justification: Practical approach given limited weather station coverage

limitations.name: Spatial Resolution
limitations.description: Model operates at premise level but aggregates to district/system level. No sub-district geographic granularity.
limitations.scope: Affects ability to analyze localized demand patterns

limitations.name: Temporal Resolution
limitations.description: Model produces annual demand projections. No monthly or daily profiles.
limitations.scope: Limits ability to analyze peak demand or seasonal patterns

limitations.name: Calibration Scope
limitations.description: Calibrated to 2025 baseline year. Historical calibration limited to available billing data.

limitations.name: Electrification Modeling
limitations.description: Fuel switching rates are scenario parameters, not endogenously determined. No economic optimization or market dynamics.
limitations.scope: Electrification projections depend on scenario assumptions

limitations.name: Data Blinding
limitations.description: NW Natural data is blinded (premise IDs anonymized). Cannot validate against specific customer accounts.
limitations.scope: Limits ability to identify and correct premise-level errors

disclaimer: This model is a prototype framework for academic and illustrative purposes only. Outputs are not suitable for regulatory filings or production forecasting. Results should be interpreted with consideration of documented limitations and data gaps. See limitations section for details.
